sentiment.reasoning: A 3% margin improvement indicates direct operational efficiency gains that typically translate into immediate positive sentiment.

sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard business maintenance and do not imply immediate or guaranteed future financial benefits.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
